programs.title: 8 Out Of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programs.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Lee Mack and Victoria Coren Mitchell take on Alan Carr and Dane Baptiste. Sam Simmons joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. With Rachel Riley.

programs.title: Edge Of Tomorrow
programs.desc: The epic action of Edge of Tomorrow unfolds in a near future in which an alien race has hit the Earth in an unrelenting assault, unbeatable by any military unit in the world. Major William Cage is an officer who has never seen a day of combat when he is unceremoniously dropped into what amounts to a suicide mission.

programs.title: Brassic
programs.desc: Cardi's mum shows up in Hawley - she is getting married... again. Meanwhile, Carol gets a nasty shock of her own.

programs.title: Brassic
programs.desc: After being humiliated by some local youths, Ashley decides it's time to up his game - with the help of Jim and Cardi.

programs.title: Count Abdulla
programs.desc: After gatecrashing Preethi’s – Amrita’s sister – hen night, Abdulla is introduced as Amrita’s new Sikh boyfriend, and Preethi is beyond excited to welcome him into the family; so much so, in fact, that she insists that he attends the wedding. Franck is less than pleased that he isn’t on the list, but he is determined to make an appearance too, in a bid to woo the family. Meanwhile, Kathy is on notice from the coven to do away with her Abdulla problem. She seeks out old friend and yoga-loving Hindu vampire Rishi for assistance. When Abdulla realizes what Franck is planning, he makes a mad dash to the wedding to try and intercept him before it is too late. Little does he know, though, that Shafi has also turned up to sabotage what he thinks are Abdulla’s nuptials at an Indian wedding that lasts long in the memory.

programs.title: Count Abdulla
programs.desc: Abdulla and Amrita escape from the wedding. They tell each other they love each other. Shafi and the coven plan to stop Abdulla from escaping.
